message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="CONSENSUS: APPROVED for Step 9 design">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED

Steve Schoger here. I sent my visual design feedback earlier (twice now). To be explicit:

1. No blocking issues from visual design.
2. I support Luca continuing as driver.
3. I agree that convert-Waiting-For-to-Next-Action should be deferred -- it's separate from the clarify workflow.
4. My design guidance: third radio, `:has()` progressive disclosure, matching existing field styling, hide context selector when Waiting For is selected, no new tokens needed.

Ready for implementation to begin.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Thanks Steve. Acknowledged -- all 4 points from your visual design guidance are implemented: third radio in existing group, `:has()` progressive disclosure, field styles matching existing patterns (same font-size, padding, gap tokens), and context selector hidden when Waiting For is selected. No new design tokens were added.

Implementation is complete with all tests green. Ready for your review of the actual CSS if you'd like to check `static/css/main.css` (search for `waiting-for-fields`).
input.summary: Acknowledged design guidance, all points implemented

routing.summary: Acknowledged design guidance, all points implemented

content.text: Still waiting for reviews from Kent Beck, Carson Gross, and Steve Krug. Have responses from Lea, Scott, Heydon, Marty, and Steve Schoger (5 of 8 reviewers).
